---
title: "LASSO escenari nul"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-04-26"
output: html_document
---

# LASSO nul

```{r}
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_nul_corrAleat.RData")
library(glmnet)

resultats_fp_lasso <- data.frame(
  N          = comb$N,
  pi         = comb$pi,
  correlation = as.character(comb$correlation), 
  FP         = NA_real_,
  FP_percent = NA_real_,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

system.time({
  for (i in 1:nrow(comb)) {

    N           <- comb$N[i]
    pi          <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i])

    fp_lasso <- numeric(iters)

    for (j in 1:iters) {
      cat("Escenari", i, "(N=", N, "pi=", pi, "corr=", correlation, ")",
          "- Simulació", j, "\n")

      X_mat <- as.matrix(X[[i]][[j]])
      y_bin <- Y[[i]][[j]]

      tryCatch({
        lambda_estim <- cv.glmnet(X_mat, y_bin,
                                  family = "binomial",
                                  alpha  = 1,
                                  nfolds = 5)

        coef_lasso   <- coef(lambda_estim, s = "lambda.min")[-1]
        fp_lasso[j]  <- sum(coef_lasso != 0)

      }, error = function(e) {
        cat(sprintf("  [WARN] Escenari %d, sim %d: %s\n", i, j, conditionMessage(e)))
        fp_lasso[j] <<- 0
      })
    }

    resultats_fp_lasso$FP[i]         <- mean(fp_lasso)
    resultats_fp_lasso$FP_percent[i] <- mean(fp_lasso) / num_vars
  }
})

print(resultats_fp_lasso)
save(resultats_fp_lasso, file = "resultats_fp_lasso_nul.RData")
```
